description: The reason behind action; the goal that gives meaning to effort. 'Porua' names what we move toward—the why that organizes the how.
sound_symbolism: The word points forward. 'Po' begins with directed force, purpose pointing. 'Ru' runs with movement toward. Then 'a' opens to the goal arrived at.
grammatical_notes: Functions as noun: 'lo porua' (the purpose). As verb: 'mi porua' (I purpose/aim). Related to 'thueli' (intend) and 'meru' (meaning).

pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Purpose as direction—not grasping at outcomes but orienting toward beneficial ends.
pillars.solarpunk-values: Shared purpose—communities organized around common aims for flourishing.
